hint: A step-by-step procedure or set of rules for solving a problem.
A storage location paired with an associated symbolic name, which contains some quantity of information.
A programming technique where a function calls itself directly or indirectly.
Mechanism of basing an object or class upon another object or class, retaining similar implementation.
The provision of a single interface to entities of different types.
Code execution that does not block, allowing other processes to run while waiting for an operation to complete.
Bundling of data and methods that operate on that data within a single unit, restricting direct access.
A data type that has one of two possible values, usually denoted true and false.
